title: How two companies that both use Monday interact
excerpt: So I work for a smaller company that uses Monday but we have a larger vendor that also uses Monday. If the user I am inviting already has a Monday account will this effect the amount of guest/user I’m allowed. I.E. I kno…

posts.author: marcusdivers03 (Marcus Divers)
posts.cookedHtml: So I work for a smaller company that uses Monday but we have a larger vendor that also uses Monday. If the user I am inviting already has a Monday account will this effect the amount of guest/user I’m allowed. I.E. I know 3 guest count as one user.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @marcusdivers03 !

The guest user count will effect your overall account if you have any plan below Pro. Pro and above, you have an unlimited amount of guests!

Hope this helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
